title: Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences
content:
Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences

Branded Course

MENU

Instructors give the theoretical content of the topics in the first 8 weeks of the semester in this practice. Professional managers from companies attend the classes the following 6 weeks and give lectures about their operational processes. Our students add practical skills to their theoretical knowledge by this way. Additionally, they are prepared with practical information to the business life and adapt themselves much faster to the sector.
